ab: mpitu tmuting mgyebu soni ga, tehuk kung pkba’an biru la.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: pt’aring sami miru la, myup pkba’an myan psba biru, kmayan pgleng myan maha “tuli! tubun tunux!”
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: hmnyang sami maha “lokah su pcba biru.”
mkbaga sami ga, cba’an sami ni pcba biru sa lmpu.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the Tayal language of numbers.

ab: kbalung sami pcba biru lmpu, m’uwas sami uwas na lmpu.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: pyux kay na S’uli Tayan ba’un mu la.
en: I have learned many Tayal languages.

ab: musa kung miru krryax, kbaga kung kay na S’uli Tayan krryax skayan mu ki yaya mu mung.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the Tayal language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
